data.label: Wait
data.description: Add a delay before next action

data.label: Email 1 - Intro
data.description: Static intro email (HTML) with {{company}}, {{personalizationHighlight}}. Tight technical-implementation-partner positioning, ends on a reply-triggering question.
data.emailSubject: A partnership idea for your agency
data.messageContent:
Hey team,

Came across {{company}} and was going through some of your work.

{{personalizationHighlight}}.

I run FusionSync AI, a small technical systems company focused on the implementation-heavy side of things like AI workflows, CRM automation, voice systems, and internal tooling.

A lot of agencies end up getting requests around automation, smarter lead handling, or AI features but don't necessarily want to build that capability in-house.

So figured I'd introduce myself. If there's ever overlap where an extra technical layer would help, happy to collaborate quietly behind the scenes.

Out of curiosity, do you currently get requests around AI automation or CRM workflow work from clients?

Shubham K
Founder, FusionSync AI

data.label: Email 2 - Follow-up
data.description: Static founder-to-founder follow-up (HTML, sent 2 days after Email 1 if no reply). Simplified, reply-triggering question, tight implementation positioning.
data.emailSubject: Following up on a quick pilot idea
data.messageContent:
Hey,

Just floating this back up in case it got buried.

Curious whether your team currently gets requests around AI automation, CRM workflows, or smarter lead handling from clients?

If yes, happy to explore helping quietly on the implementation side when useful, even starting small.

Shubham K
Founder, FusionSync AI
